blended.narrative: Lake Louise is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 6 inches of dry powder expected. Snow levels around 3,759 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 2.3" of snow, highs of 22°F. Expect powder.
Thursday: 5" of snow, highs of 22°F. Expect powder.
